name: scorecrux-glassbox-benchmark
description: GlassBox — open-source EU AI Act + SOC2 compliance benchmark for agentic systems. Neutral and pluggable; CueCrux/Crux is the reference arm.

scripts.reference: tsx run-glassbox.ts --arm C0 --dry-run && tsx run-glassbox.ts --arm G --dry-run && tsx run-glassbox.ts --arm GM --dry-run && node scripts/build-reference.mjs
